name: Biscuits for Your Heart's Content - Heart Healthy
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 475 degrees F (245 degrees C).
2. Sift together the flour, baking powder, and salt in a bowl.
3. In another bowl, measure the oil and milk.
4. Pour the oil and milk mixture into the dry ingredients.
5. Stir with a fork until the mixture forms a ball that leaves the side of the bowl.
6. Knead the dough 10 times.
7. Roll out to a thickness of 1/4 inch (approximately) and cut with floured glass or biscuit cutter.
8. Bake for 10-12 minutes.
